Description: Table containing attribute information associated with the radiometric data set.
3-band raster geospatial radiometric data file of the corrected thorium/potassium ratio in radiometric equivalent thorium (ppm) / radiometric equivalent potassium (%).
Unique numeric values contained in each raster cell.
3-band raster geospatial radiometric data file of the corrected uranium/potassium ratio in radiometric equivalent uranium (ppm) / radiometric equivalent potassium (%).
Unique numeric values contained in each raster cell.
3-band raster geospatial radiometric data file of the corrected uranium/thorium ratio in radiometric equivalent uranium (ppm) / radiometric equivalent thorium (ppm).
Unique numeric values contained in each raster cell.
3-band raster geospatial radiometric data file of the corrected potatasium, thorium, and uranium shown as a normalized ternary image.
Unique numeric values contained in each raster cell.
